name: proporacle-mobile
description: Capacitor WebView shell loading the PropORACLE Flask UI from Railway (set PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL before cap sync).

scripts.sync:prod: PowerShell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$u = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL','Process'); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($u)) { throw 'Set PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL to your live https URL (Railway), then run npm run sync:prod again.' }; if ($u -match 'YOUR-SERVICE') { throw 'URL still contains YOUR-SERVICE placeholder; set PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL to your real hostname.' }; if (-not ($u.StartsWith('https://'))) { throw 'Production URL must start with https://' }; npm run sync:android"
scripts.sync:url: PowerShell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$u=$env:npm_config_url; if (-not $u) { throw 'Usage: npm run sync:url --url=http://IP:PORT'; }; $env:PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL=$u; npm run sync:android"
scripts.clean-deploy:android: npm run sync:android && npm run clean:android && npm run open:android
